english translation text: Allahuma Inni Amsaytu Laka
In the name of Allah the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي امْسَيْتُ لَكَ عَبْداً دَاخِرًا
english translation text: O Allah, I am, on this night, a very humble servant of Yours.

arabic text: لاَ امْلِكُ لِنَفْسِي نَفْعًا وَلاَ ضَرًّا وَّلاَ اصْرِفُ عَنْهَا سُوْءً
english translation text: I have no control over gains and losses for myself, nor can I avert any evil from it.
I bear witness to that over myself,

arabic text: وَاَعْتَرِفُ لَكَ بِضَعْفِ قُوَّتِي وَقِلَّةِ حِيلَتِي
english translation text: I acknowledge to You my weakness and my lack of means.
Therefore, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
and fulfill for me what You have promised me,
and to all the believers, men and women,
the (promise of) forgiveness on this night.
And complete for me what You have given me.
Surely I am Your servant, poor, humble,
weak, needy and disgraced.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ لاَ تَجْعَلْنِي نَاسِيًا لِّذِكْرِكَ فِيمَا اَوْلَيْتَنِي
english translation text: O Allah, do not make me forgetful of Your remembrance, in what You have entrusted me,
nor heedless of Your favours, in what You have given me,

arabic text: وَلاَ اَيِسًا مِنْ اِجَابَتِكَ وَإِنْ اَبْطَاَتْ عَنِّي
english translation text: nor despairing of Your answer, even if it was delayed for me.

arabic text: فِي سَرَّآءَ اَوْ ضَرَّآءَ اَوْ شِدَّةٍ اَوْ رَخَآءٍ
english translation text: (Let this be on all occasions) in happiness or sorrow, in difficulty or ease,

arabic text: اَوْ عَافِيَةٍ اَوْ بَلَآءٍ اَوْ بُؤْسٍ اَوْ نَعْمَآءَ
english translation text: in health or sickness, in misfortunes or blessings,
surely You listen to the supplications.
